  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphics Designer",
  "description": "LEAM Consulting is the foremost consulting firm which stands out in areas of professional certification training, HR advisory services, Business Development/Startup and IT consulting services in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer

Job Location:&nbsp;Mokola, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Industry: Printing Firm

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative Graphics Designer to bring bold ideas to life!


Responsibilities


	Maintain brand consistency across all design outputs
	Contribute to creative brainstorming graphics designs
	Deliver designs with quick turnaround and attention to detail
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign &ndash; bonus if you know Canva too!)
	Strong understanding of visual trends, color theory, and typography
	Ability to work independently and take initiative and creativity that flows better with a bit of flexibility.
	Access to beautiful work environments and lifestyle perks


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a minimum of SSCE with 1 year of experience.
	Preferably Male candidate.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Portfolio to:&nbsp;jobs@leamconsulting.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Graphics Designer Job at LEAM Consulting




        
    

        
        LEAM Consulting is the foremost consulting firm which stands out in areas of professional certification training, HR advisory services, Business Development/Startup and IT consulting services in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer

Job Location: Mokola, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Industry: Printing Firm

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative Graphics Designer to bring bold ideas to life!


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain brand consistency across all design outputs
	Contribute to creative brainstorming graphics designs
	Deliver designs with quick turnaround and attention to detail
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign – bonus if you know Canva too!)
	Strong understanding of visual trends, color theory, and typography
	Ability to work independently and take initiative and creativity that flows better with a bit of flexibility.
	Access to beautiful work environments and lifestyle perks


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a minimum of SSCE with 1 year of experience.
	Preferably Male candidate.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
